summary: The user is planning a trip to Tokyo in May and seeks assistance in comparing airline prices. They initially provided details about their travel preferences and later clarified their departure city as New York, leading to a revised price comparison for economy class flights from New York to Tokyo on ANA, Japan Airlines, and Singapore Airlines.
facts: The user is planning a trip to Tokyo in May for around 7-10 days. The user is considering economy class for their flights. The user does not have any loyalty programs or credit cards that would influence their airline choice. The user flew out of New York for their recent trip to Los Angeles. The average price for a 7-10 day trip in May from New York to Tokyo on ANA is estimated to be $700-$900 USD. The average price for a 7-10 day trip in May from New York to Tokyo on Japan Airlines is estimated to be $650-$850 USD. The average price for a 7-10 day trip in May from New York to Tokyo on Singapore Airlines is estimated to be $750-$950 USD. Non-stop flights from New York (JFK) to Tokyo (NRT) typically take around 11 hours and 30 minutes to 12 hours and 30 minutes. Morning flights from New York to Tokyo can be $50-$100 more expensive than afternoon or evening flights. The user is interested in morning flights from New York to Tokyo on ANA, Japan Airlines, and Singapore Airlines. The user received specific price estimates for morning flights from New York to Tokyo on May 10th and May 17th for each airline.
